regimeNotes: NEUTRAL regime maintained 2026-07-05 (Sunday; US equity markets closed all weekend/holiday -- NYSE/Nasdaq were shut Friday July 3 for the observed Independence Day holiday since July 4 fell on a Saturday, then closed the weekend as usual; trading resumes Monday July 6. SPY/MSFT/GOOGL/UNH/NVDA/GLD marks carried forward unchanged from the July 2 close since there has been no trading session since -- confirmed via stockanalysis.com fallback since the Stooq CSV endpoint remained unreachable/404 again today). Crypto trades 24/7 and drifted marginally lower: BTC $62,577 (+0.03% vs yesterday), ETH $1,758.25 (-0.28%), SOL $80.37 (-1.24%); total crypto mcap ~$2.254T (+0.10% 24h), BTC dominance 55.70% (+0.10pt, still stable), Fear & Greed 23 Extreme Fear (vs 22 yesterday, essentially unchanged -- sentiment remains deeply fearful with no inflection). Macro backdrop unchanged from the prior read: soft June NFP (+57K vs ~110K consensus) with downward revisions to April/May continues to cool near-term hike odds, DXY ~100.88 (flat), 10Y yield ~4.48-4.49% (flat), no FOMC or scheduled data catalysts over the holiday weekend. Crypto sleeve now 19.78% of NAV (ticked down fractionally with the crypto softness), still just under the 20% neutral cap -- no room to add without breaching the guardrail. Cash 13.62% of NAV, comfortably above the 5% floor. MSFT sits at exactly 15.00% of NAV, at its position entry cap -- no further adds. NAV 99,149.63 (-0.024% vs July 4), essentially flat. REGIME UNCHANGED (neutral): with equities closed for the third consecutive non-trading day and crypto's move immaterial and non-directional, there is no new evidence to revisit any thesis or invalidation level. No invalidation levels breached; no guardrail breaches. HOLD day, zero trades.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta at $744.78 (above $741.75 avgCost; +0.41%, ~13.16% NAV). Markets closed Friday (July 4th observed holiday) through the weekend; mark unchanged from the July 2 close. Broad index still the diversified anchor while breadth stays uneven under the surface (chip/megacap tech softness). Hold.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed multi-hike path forcing a technical downtrend in the broad index.
